name: model rationale detector emits a structured per-prompt status record with prompt_id and verdict
command:
mkdir -p prompts/a && printf 'name: a
model: sonnet
model_rationale: ok-balance for triage
' > prompts/a/v1.0.0.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/model-rationale.sh" --prompts-dir prompts --emit json --out result.json 2>err.txt && grep -q '"prompt_id":"a"' result.json && grep -q '"verdict":"pass"' result.json && echo ok 1>&2
